name.description: The legal name of the organization

address.description: Structured address with state and country

email.description: Email to send the password reset link to

description.example: Clear the site and prepare equipment.

requiredDocuments.description: Names of documents the seller must submit for this milestone

productSource.description: Tells the system whether to use the product from the order or the matching request to determine the category.

milestones.description: Ordered list of milestones. Required for SERVICE and FINANCIAL workflow types. Must have at least one milestone.

key.description: Catalog key or free-form custom string

comparator.description: Comparison operator — determines the expected shape of value

value.description: Polymorphic value — shape depends on comparator: number|string for scalar comparators, [number, number] for between/±, string[] for "in list", string (regex pattern) for "matches regex", omitted for absent/present

required.description: When true, a missing measured value during inspection counts as FAIL

stageId.description: ID of the backing TransactionStage document

status.description: The new status to transition to

type.description: The type of document being uploaded

slotIndex.description: Index of the document slot in the requiredDocuments array

trackingReference.description: Tracking reference number (e.g., Bill of Lading number)

trackingUrl.description: Direct link to the carrier's shipment tracking page

notes.description: Seller's notes on what was delivered

documents.description: One or more Q&Q certification documents uploaded by the buyer or admin.

productId.description: ID of the product to purchase

location.description: Optional location override for the order

qqCriteria.description: Q&Q acceptance criteria (only when category group allowsInspection=true)

durationUnit.description: Duration unit for lease/charter (hour, day, month)

milestones.description: Buyer-defined milestones (only when category group milestoneDelivery=true)

description.example: Clear the site and prepare equipment.

milestones.description: Ordered list of milestones. Required for SERVICE and FINANCIAL workflow types.

requiredDocuments.description: List of document names required for this milestone

durationUnit.description: Duration unit for lease/charter (hour, day, month)

qqCriteria.description: Q&Q acceptance criteria. Supply an empty array or omit when the category group does not have allowsInspection=true.
Q&Q acceptance criteria attached to this request

durationUnit.description: Duration unit for lease/charter (hour, day, month)

qqCriteria.description: Q&Q acceptance criteria. Supply an empty array or omit when the category group does not have allowsInspection=true.

request.description: ID of the ProductRequest being responded to

product.description: ID of the product being offered

responseType.description: Whether the seller is accepting all terms or counter-offering

offerExpiresAt.description: When the latest offer expires (ISO string)

isOfferExpired.description: Whether the latest offer has expired

url.description: Public URL of the uploaded file

transactionId.description: ID of the transaction being disputed

stageId.description: ID of the stage being disputed

url.description: Public URL of the uploaded file
Public URL of the uploaded file

password.description: Initial password (users should change this later)

permissions.description: List of permissions granted to the admin

isActive.description: Whether the admin account is active

requiredFrom.description: Who is required to submit this document

isMandatory.description: Whether this document is mandatory for the transaction to proceed

requiredAtStatus.description: The transaction status at which this document becomes required

requiredFrom.description: Who is required to submit this document

isMandatory.description: Whether this document is mandatory for the transaction to proceed

requiredAtStatus.description: The transaction status at which this document becomes required

decision.description: Decision to approve or reject the document

rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejection (required if decision is REJECTED)

decision.description: APPROVED advances the workflow to the next stage. REJECTED resets the stage to INSPECTION_PENDING so the buyer can re-upload.

rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejection. Required when decision is REJECTED.

deadline.description: ISO 8601 date string for the response deadline

criterionId.description: UUID matching QQCriterion.id stored on the request

measuredValue.description: The actual measured value from the inspection report. Polymorphic — matches QQCriterion value shape.

inspectedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of when inspection took place

reportFileUrl.description: URL to the uploaded inspection report (PDF/image)

reportFileHash.description: SHA256 hex digest of the report file for tamper detection (64 hex chars)
